feat.name: Omnikinesis
feat.text: You can realign your kinetic gate with a thought. Replace one of your impulse feats using the same process as reflow elements. You can replace only one, even if you have double reflow.

traits.name: Kineticist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the kineticist class.
